# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: helloworld-v2
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: guestbook
      version: v2
      release: canary-01
      project: bookinfo
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: guestbook
        version: v2
        release: canary-01
        project: bookinfo
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: helloworld-v3
  annotations:
    # skip sidecar injection for services that need direct access
    # without ingress/egress rules
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 9081
    targetPort: 9080
  selector:
    app: guestbook
    version: v3
    release: canary-01
    project: bookinfo
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: helloworld-v2
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: guestbook
      version: v2
      release: canary-01
      project: bookinfo
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: guestbook
        version: v2
        release: canary-01
        project: bookinfo
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: helloworld-v3
  annotations:
    # skip sidecar injection for services that need direct access
    # without ingress/egress rules
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 9081
    targetPort: 9080
  selector:
    app: guestbook
    version: v3
    release: canary-01
    project: bookinfo
